root.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_interest_rate * 100 as loan_interest_rate , sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , current_date from sc_lon_m_rule , sc_lon_m_int_step_rate , sc_cls_confirm_data where sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_type and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_cls_confirm_data.loan_code in ('0','1') and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' and sc_lon_m_int_step_rate.loan_interest_rate <> '0' /*WHERE*/
